title: quercus × deleiensis
intro: Quercus × deleiensis, also known as the hybrid oak, is a plant species resulting from the cross between Quercus glauca and Quercus acutissima, native to China. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Quercus × deleiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus × deleiensis include tea, extracts, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
